column7: medical concepts are not explained. It feels very formal and therefore less natural than it could be.

Concerning naturalness: are you really trying to make it sound like a human doctor? In that case, it could feel more natural if it said e.g. "I would advise..." instead of "it is advisable to...", as it currently says. But I guess its debatable if this is desired..
